name: rushing/laravel-knowledge-spine-data
description: The knowledge engine's shared Data/DTO vocabulary: three-valued Ternary, the EvaluationSubject seam, ordering points, the adjudication records (Assertion/Verdict/Determination/OrderingStamp), and the compliance + coherence Data classes (rules, resolution, change, concepts). The predicate/adjudication/resolution kernel stays private; this is the data surface hosts and satellites share for 1:1 parity.
